title: Marketing Professional to Data Scientist
description: Career transition from marketing to technical role
goal: I am a marketing professional with 5 years of experience and I want to transition to data science

matched_occupation.label: market research analyst
matched_occupation.description: Market research analysts collect the information gathered in the market research and study it to draw conclusions. They define the potential customers of a product, the target group and the way they can be reached. Market research analysts analyse the position of products in the market from different perspectives such as features, prices and competitors. They analyse cross selling and interdependencies between different products and their placement. Market research analysts prepare information helpful for the development of marketing strategies.
